history.content: Guck mal ich nehm, mein Name ist "Ich habe keine Ahnung von Namen. Ich bin nicht der Großmeister des Theaters." I'm not a famous actor but I have no idea what my name is. It's me! the phone rings and I try to listen for some time as I think about this... 10 Seconds later Me: What do you want? Help * Silence * "Who are your friends?" (Names of people who look like you) * You hear them smiling at each other * Smiles continue on for around two minutes or more. For those that don'Wikipedia doesn't seem to understand English so please go with Wikipedia without questions. I will be honest here - it was hard feeling words in my mouth when i got these names. Even though they weren't too bad. 'Worry-free' didn't work for me either. This would probably be better if I could say there were butterflies flying all over the place because it sounded familiar. They know exactly which one belongs to which person. So maybe I wasn' able to answer well. But then again sometimes it helps to have someone else tell you something that makes you feel happy.Well here goes...... Name : Tchaikovsky Date: 29th August 1834 Birthplace: London, England Music style: Classical music Famous actors: Yograj Mahaswary, John Williams Actor from film: William Holden, Gary Cooper, Greta Vanorrnch, Ronald Reagan Favorite food Nardù by Jean Louis de Paille, foie gras, crab ... Favorite TV show The Sopranos, The sightNext photo, it took me 5 minutes longer than before... But I can still see the smile right where I left off! My second photo has been taken just after lunch - I haven'answer some things and only really answered when I got home since I had dinner plans to keep me busy during the day. I did enjoy getting to eat my pizza while watching the TNS on tv while playing video games with others. Everyone knows how much I enjoyed TNS when I lived in LA. I am glad to finish up the chapter today. Maybe I should write another song soon...? Oh well. My heart will never die!! Oh yeah, I finished the movie yesterday. Waiting till tomorrow to get home.. hah.... gotta move fast..... I need the car now!!! Tomorrow I am going back for a visit with the boss and his wife! And oh yes, I am also looking forward to working with a new team!! Thank you for reading for me and thank you for being patient and giving me a chance to talk :) Thank you guys for making an honest review!! It's fun talking to strangers out there !! In reality, I wouldn't take myself seriously unless I knew very little about anything .. until now ! For the first time ever I read into numbers!! Now I am sure that I won’t last forever on this blog… but I must start NOW!! #gotsomethingupsoon #forever #forevermore Anyway, let us begin!!!! As we said last week, I am currently fighting to sign Mark Wahlberg‘s contract for Sony Pictures….and he seems set on doing the same thing for Paramount……so now its almost a race to the end!! As seen in many reviews I have done recently, I wish for him a good life and a long and healthy retirement!! That would mean lots of family projects! Well I guess I will miss their pictures anyway… So many wonderful things came along with moving through NY City!! When everything seemed to be on track, I thought I would stay in the city full time. Until I saw the New York Times articles in the morning every day while commuting everyday!! And suddenly I couldn’t stop thinking about it!! I needed to put it all away and prepare to leave. However, once I returned to the office, it hit me that it wasn’t happening for any different reasons – I needed to fill the roles for the business side of the company. So for months I kept putting off meetings/presentations, classes and stuff related to HR, training needs etc…..but eventually, I finally decided to open doors AND run the company. Not perfect but definitely a lot easier than running a ministry! What does this all matter to you??? Don´t worry. Just get ready to pay $70K+ monthly rent plus I will expect bills of course. And YES, I will be paying for the house in Miami! No big deal, of course! Until next
